name: happy-path-loop-runs
task: Run /autoresearch on the go-dev skill. Its evals already exist. Improve it until it passes all assertions or you hit a limit.
assertions: Response creates a git branch named autoresearch/go-dev before making any edits
Response displays baseline score before starting the improvement loop
Response makes exactly one edit per iteration and re-runs evals before deciding to commit or revert
Response commits when score improves and reverts working tree changes when score regresses
Response prints a progress line after each iteration showing current score, delta, and stall count
Response generates a markdown report saved to evals/results/ at the end of the run
Response does NOT edit any files inside the evals/ directory
